requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence — IEC 61000 Series and IEC 62920 for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC证据——光伏逆变器IEC 61000系列及IEC 62920
requirement_topic.zht: EMC證據——光伏逆變器IEC 61000系列及IEC 62920

summary.en: PV inverter EMC evidence for Eswatini should be prepared around IEC 61000 series test methods and IEC 62920, the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment. SWASA is the national standards authority, while ESERA and EEC may expect EMC evidence as part of SSEG, net-metering, or grid-connection documentation. Because Eswatini is integrated with Southern African power-sector practice, project specifications may also request NRS 097-2 style documentation that includes power-quality and utility-interface expectations. No automatic acceptance of Chinese domestic EMC certificates should be assumed.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼光伏逆变器EMC证据应围绕IEC 61000系列测试方法和光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准IEC 62920准备。SWASA是国家标准机构，ESERA和EEC可能在SSEG、净计量或并网文件中要求EMC证据。由于埃斯瓦蒂尼与南部非洲电力行业实践相联系，项目规格也可能要求包含电能质量和公用事业接口预期的NRS 097-2式文件。不应假定中国国内EMC证书会被自动接受。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼光伏逆變器EMC證據應圍繞IEC 61000系列測試方法和光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準IEC 62920準備。SWASA是國家標準機構，ESERA和EEC可能在SSEG、淨計量或併網文件中要求EMC證據。由於埃斯瓦蒂尼與南部非洲電力行業實務相聯繫，項目規格也可能要求包含電能品質和公用事業介面預期的NRS 097-2式文件。不應假定中國國內EMC證書會被自動接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits
ESERA SSEG / net-metering and EEC grid-connection documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories using China domestic requirements. Those reports may be useful technical support, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62920 or project-specified IEC 61000 evidence unless the test scope, limits, laboratory accreditation, model coverage, and report language are accepted by the Eswatini project reviewer, SWASA conformity process, ESERA, or EEC.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004以及CNAS认可实验室按中国国内要求出具的测试报告。这些报告可作为有用的技术支持，但不能替代IEC 62920或项目指定的IEC 61000证据，除非测试范围、限值、实验室认可、型号覆盖和报告语言被埃斯瓦蒂尼项目审查方、SWASA合格评定流程、ESERA或EEC接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004以及CNAS認可實驗室按中國國內要求出具的測試報告。這些報告可作為有用的技術支持，但不能替代IEC 62920或項目指定的IEC 61000證據，除非測試範圍、限值、實驗室認可、型號覆蓋和報告語言被埃斯瓦蒂尼項目審查方、SWASA合格評定流程、ESERA或EEC接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence should be mapped clause-by-clause to IEC 62920 and the relevant IEC 61000 tests before submission. Exporters should prepare model-specific EMC reports from an internationally recognised laboratory, confirm whether the Eswatini reviewer requires ILAC-accredited reports, and document any differences between Chinese test conditions and the Eswatini 230/400 V, 50 Hz application.
gap.zh: 差距：在提交前，应将GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC证据逐条映射至IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000测试。出口商应准备针对具体型号、由国际认可实验室出具的EMC报告，确认埃斯瓦蒂尼审查方是否要求ILAC认可报告，并记录中国测试条件与埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V、50 Hz应用之间的任何差异。
gap.zht: 差距：在提交前，應將GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC證據逐條映射至IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000測試。出口商應準備針對具體型號、由國際認可實驗室出具的EMC報告，確認埃斯瓦蒂尼審查方是否要求ILAC認可報告，並記錄中國測試條件與埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V、50 Hz應用之間的任何差異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by SWASA conformity, ESERA SSEG or net-metering review, EEC connection review, or project-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence under GB/T or NB/T frameworks may support domestic voluntary certification but is not automatically recognised for Eswatini project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence alone for Eswatini. Prepare IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, then confirm report acceptance with SWASA, ESERA, EEC, or the project owner. Record any voltage or configuration differences from Chinese domestic testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC证据进入埃斯瓦蒂尼。请为具体逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000报告，然后向SWASA、ESERA、EEC或项目业主确认报告接受性。记录与中国国内测试之间的任何电压或配置差异。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC證據進入埃斯瓦蒂尼。請為具體逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000報告，然後向SWASA、ESERA、EEC或項目業主確認報告接受性。記錄與中國國內測試之間的任何電壓或配置差異。
